narrative:
Precinct Urbana 1-B (precinct in Champaign County) has 783 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.7 percentage points.
